Landing.eyebrow: Your organization, available to your AIs
Landing.title: Turn intention into action.
Landing.subtitle: Lownheur brings your categories, events, goals and schedules together. Manage them from a clear dashboard or directly from your AI through MCP.
Landing.featuresSubtitle: What you organize visually is immediately available to the tools you authorize.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Structure every area of your life in a clear, illustrated space.

events.title: Events
events.description: Keep what needs to happen with the right context and no clutter.

goals.title: Goals
goals.description: Track your intentions from the first idea to the achieved result.

schedules.title: Schedules
schedules.description: Place an event or goal in time and see what comes next immediately.

Landing.pricingSubtitle: Start for free. Upgrade when your usage makes it worthwhile.
Landing.mcpSubtitle: A remote MCP endpoint, compact tools and the same permissions as your dashboard.

clients.chatgpt: Connect Lownheur and manage your organization directly in a conversation.
clients.claude: Add the remote server to compatible integrations and keep control.
clients.mcp: Use any compatible MCP client with authentication tied to your account.

Landing.ctaTitle: Your next action deserves a space built for it.
